subject: [PATCH v7 07/10] dax/kmem: resolve default online type at probe time

2026-07-12.patch_summary: This patch modifies the kmem driver to explicitly set the default online type at probe time, rather than inheriting it from the system default. This change is made by calling a new function `__add_memory_driver_managed` that takes an additional argument for the online type. The behavior of the code remains unchanged, but this modification sets the stage for future changes related to memory management and NUMA policies.
